name: Italian Anise Bread
recipeInstructions:
Bread
1. In a large mixing bowl combine the yeast, 1 cup of flour, and anise seeds.
2. Heat milk, butter, sugar, and salt in a saucepan until just warm.
3. Stir to melt the butter mixture.
4. Add the heated liquid to the flour mixture.
5. Beat in the egg, lemon peel, and juice on low speed for 1 minute, scraping sides constantly.
6. Beat on high speed for 3 minutes.
7. Stir in the remaining flour by hand to make a soft dough.
8. Knead on a floured board until smooth and elastic, about 8-10 minutes.
9. Place in a lightly greased bowl. Turn once to grease, cover, and let rise in a warm place for 1/2 hour.
10. Punch down the dough and let rest for 10 minutes.
11. Shape into a round loaf, cover, and let rise until double (about 45 minutes) in a greased pan.
12. Bake at 375°F for 35-40 minutes until done.
Frosting
1. Stir all ingredients together until smooth and spread on the warm cake.
